mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_tokens(id, device_id, user_id, token, expires_at, revoked) VALUES(#{id}, #{deviceId}, #{userId}, #{token}, #{expiresAt}, #{revoked});
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM refresh_tokens WHERE user_id = #{userId} and device_id = #{deviceId};
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM refresh_tokens WHERE user_id = #{userId} and device_id = #{deviceId};
mapper.select: SELECT id, device_id, user_id, token, expires_at, revoked, created_at, updated_at FROM refresh_tokens WHERE token = #{refreshToken};
